name_cn:
『YSL Saint Laurent』
New Saint Laurent Paris💓Classic YSL model👉Model No.: 2120🔺Made with imported palm-grain cowhide and crocodile pattern, original custom hardware, very comfortable to the touch. This model retains the classic Logo design.💋💋Size: 23*14*9cm
